items.description: Cyberonix is a complete resource hub for Cyber Security Community. Our aim is to make this tool an 1 stop solution for all the Hackers out there to get resources of various topics in Cyber Security. We will keep updating this tool & adding new & updated resources on the go.

Enter Real commands correctly, move to the next host, and get a point. Can you get 100?

items.description: CloudSniffer is a powerful tool designed to aid in the discovery of the real IP address of a website protected by Cloudflare. It leverages brute force techniques by testing a list of IP addresses and analyzing the status codes returned by the server to uncover the actual IP address of the target website.

items.name: vibe-coding-penetration-tester
items.description: Vibe Coding? Cool story. But your vibe might be "security breach waiting to happen." Introducing VibePenTester, the AI pen-tester who rolls its eyes at your half-baked code, discovers your vulnerabilities faster than your coworkers discover free pizza, and gently bullies your web app into compliance. Less "vibe check," more "reality check."

items.name: Injectra
items.description: Injectra is a Python-based tool for injecting custom payloads into various file types using their magic numbers. It supports file types like zip, rar, docx, jpg, and more, allowing for customizable payloads. It ensures seamless payload injection while maintaining the integrity of the original file.

items.name: Injectra
items.description: Injectra is a Python-based tool for injecting custom payloads into various file types using their magic numbers. It supports file types like zip, rar, docx, jpg, and more, allowing for customizable payloads. It ensures seamless payload injection while maintaining the integrity of the original file.

items.name: c2-cloud
items.description: The C2 Cloud is a robust web-based C2 framework, designed to simplify the life of penetration testers. It allows easy access to compromised backdoors, just like accessing an EC2 instance in the AWS cloud. It can manage several simultaneous backdoor sessions with a user-friendly interface.

items.description: ACEshark is a utility designed for rapid extraction and analysis of Windows service configurations and Access Control Entries, eliminating the need for tools like accesschk.exe or other non-native binaries.

items.name: Project-Deep-Focus
items.description: Your personal 'Mini Shodan'. A high-performance network reconnaissance engine designed for massive scale asset discovery. Specializes in identifying unsecured services (Open RTSP Cameras, No-Auth VNC, Anonymous FTP) and deeply fingerprints device models with a beautiful real-time terminal dashboard.
